[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A young person stands in a decorated, arcade-like indoor space, wearing sunglasses and a light jacket while posing in front of colorful posters and graphics.

Main Subject:
A person with dark, slightly messy hair stands facing the camera with a neutral expression. They wear white-framed oval sunglasses, a black shirt with a printed graphic across the chest, a light-colored open jacket with sleeves draped over the shoulders, a thin chain necklace, dark pants, and white-and-blue sneakers. Their arms hang down loosely, and they appear to be standing still with their feet apart.

Setting:
The scene is indoors, with walls and display surfaces covered in colorful printed designs and signs. Behind the person is a large circular graphic with red and white segments. Around them, multiple poster-like images and signs appear on the wall, including a speaker-like dark circle shape on the right side. The lighting is bright and somewhat high-contrast, giving the image a vivid, posterized look.

Visual Details:
The background includes a collage of colorful rectangular posters, bright reds, blues, yellows, and black areas. The large circular design behind the person contains red and white curved sections and a central element that is unclear. The person is centered in the composition, photographed from a slightly low or eye-level angle, with the camera close enough to show clothing details clearly. The floor area in the lower left and right contains more cluttered graphics and partial signs, though many details are unclear due to blur and overlay.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person wearing sunglasses and a light jacket, posing in front of a wall filled with colorful posters and graphic decorations. The background includes a large red-and-white circular design and additional framed images and signage around the person.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

No clearly readable text is visible in the screenshot.

# Structured Version

- [unclear]: There are many small signs/labels in the background, but the text is too blurry/small to extract accurately.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with black hair and sunglasses stands in front of a wall adorned with various vintage signs and logos. He is wearing a white zip-up hoodie over a black t-shirt with a graphic print of a motorcycle and skulls, and black pants with an embroidered design. He has a silver chain around his neck and is wearing black and white sneakers.

The background wall is a textured, concrete-like surface covered in a collage of vintage items. To the left, a bright red "EXIT" sign with neon lettering is prominent. Below it, there are several circular and rectangular signs, including one that reads "GUI SUPR MOTO" and another with "GR LIVE". Further down, a circular sign with "DAVID" is visible.

To the right of the man, a large circular logo with red and white sections and a purple emblem is displayed. Above it, framed pictures of vintage patches or logos are hung. To the right of these, a tall, vertical sign with blue and yellow lettering reads "TIRES". Below that, a large white sign with blue lettering spells out "Mobi". There are also several smaller circular stickers and emblems scattered across the wall.

The overall style is urban, gritty, and has a retro, automotive theme, reminiscent of a garage or a vintage diner. The lighting appears to be a mix of ambient light and some brighter, focused light sources, creating a slightly dramatic effect with some shadows. The color palette is dominated by the grays of the wall, the red of the "EXIT" sign, the blue and yellow of the "TIRES" sign, and the black and white of the man's clothing and the various logos. The mood is cool and confident, with a hint of rebellious youth culture.
